_comment: Audit Template Configuration — copy this file to config.json, fill in all fields, then run /setup-audit. Fields ending in _comment are documentation only and are stripped at runtime.

company._comment: Company identity — used in headings, meta tags, email copy, and report footers.

domain._comment: URLs — siteUrl is required. reportBaseUrl and corsOrigin are derived from siteUrl automatically if left empty.

branding._comment: Brand colors must be valid CSS hex values (3 or 6 digits). logoUrl can be a relative path from /public or a full URL.

contact._comment: Primary contact details shown in the footer and email templates. Only email is required; all other fields are optional.

team._comment: Add one object per team member. At least one entry is required. calendarUrl accepts any booking link (cal.com, Calendly, etc.).

social._comment: All social links are optional. Provide full URLs including https://.

notifications._comment: Email notification settings. recipients receives a copy of every new lead. fromEmail must be a sender address verified in your Resend account.
